name: CovJSON TiledNdArray
abstract: Tiled range encoding that partitions data spatially/temporally via URI templates, enabling efficient partial loading.
description:
# CovJSON TiledNdArray

Partitions the NdArray into spatial/temporal tiles loaded via URI templates. Enables efficient partial loading for large datasets.

## UML: Range → 0..1 TiledNdArray → 1..* NdArray
annotatedSchema:
$schema: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema
description: CoverageJSON TiledNdArray for partitioned range data
type: object
required:
- type
- dataType
- axisNames
- shape
- tileSets
properties:
  type:
    type: string
    const: TiledNdArray
  dataType:
    type: string
  axisNames:
    type: array
    items:
      type: string
  shape:
    type: array
    items:
      type: integer
  tileSets:
    type: array
    items:
      type: object
      properties:
        tileShape:
          type: array
          items:
            type: integer
        urlTemplate:
          type: string
